# gcgo

gcgo is a fast, single-binary CLI for Google Cloud Platform, written in Go. It replaces the `gcloud` CLI for common operations with lower startup latency and no Python dependency. The binary is statically linked and requires no runtime.

## Installation

```
go install github.com/mosajjal/gcgo/cmd/gcgo@latest
```

Or build from source:

```
git clone https://github.com/mosajjal/gcgo
cd gcgo
make build
./bin/gcgo
```

## Authentication

gcgo delegates entirely to Application Default Credentials (ADC). Run `gcgo auth login` to authenticate interactively, or set `GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS` to a service account key file. Service account impersonation is supported via `--impersonate-service-account` on any command.

## Global Flags

These flags work on every command:

- `--project STRING` — GCP project ID. Falls back to the value set in config (`gcgo config set core/project`).
- `--format STRING` — Output format. `table` (default) or `json`.
- `--impersonate-service-account STRING` — Service account email to impersonate for the request.
- `--quiet` — Suppress non-essential output (progress messages, hints).

## Config

gcgo stores config at `~/.config/gcgo/properties.toml`. Keys mirror gcloud's structure.

```
gcgo config set core/project my-project-id
gcgo config set compute/region us-central1
gcgo config set compute/zone us-central1-a
gcgo config get core/project
gcgo config list
gcgo config unset core/project
```

## Commands by Service

### auth — Authentication

```
gcgo auth login [--service-account-key PATH]
gcgo auth list
gcgo auth print-access-token [--scope SCOPE] [--impersonate-service-account EMAIL]
gcgo auth print-identity-token [--audience URL] [--impersonate-service-account EMAIL] [--include-email]
gcgo auth revoke
```

### projects — Project Management

```
gcgo projects list
gcgo projects describe PROJECT_ID
```

### compute — Compute Engine

Instances:
```
gcgo compute instances list [--zone ZONE]
gcgo compute instances describe INSTANCE [--zone ZONE]
gcgo compute instances create INSTANCE [--zone ZONE]
gcgo compute instances delete INSTANCE [--zone ZONE]
```

SSH / SCP:
```
gcgo compute ssh INSTANCE [--zone ZONE]
gcgo compute scp SRC DST [--zone ZONE]
```

Disks:
```
gcgo compute disks list [--zone ZONE]
gcgo compute disks describe DISK [--zone ZONE]
gcgo compute disks create DISK [--zone ZONE]
gcgo compute disks delete DISK [--zone ZONE]
```

Firewall rules:
```
gcgo compute firewall-rules list
gcgo compute firewall-rules describe RULE
gcgo compute firewall-rules create RULE
gcgo compute firewall-rules delete RULE
```

Networks and subnets:
```
gcgo compute networks list
gcgo compute networks describe NETWORK
gcgo compute subnets list [--region REGION]
gcgo compute subnets describe SUBNET [--region REGION]
```

Other compute resources (list / describe / create / delete unless noted):
- `addresses` — static IP addresses
- `routers` — Cloud Routers
- `routes`
- `forwarding-rules` [--region]
- `backend-services` [--global | --region]
- `health-checks`
- `url-maps`
- `target-http-proxies`
- `target-https-proxies`
- `target-tcp-proxies`
- `target-ssl-proxies`
- `images`
- `snapshots`
- `instance-templates`
- `instance-groups` [--zone]
- `autoscalers` [--zone]
- `vpn-tunnels` [--region]

### storage — Cloud Storage

```
gcgo storage ls [gs://BUCKET[/PREFIX]]
gcgo storage cp SRC DST
gcgo storage mv SRC DST
gcgo storage rm gs://BUCKET/OBJECT
gcgo storage cat gs://BUCKET/OBJECT
gcgo storage rsync SRC DST
gcgo storage mb gs://BUCKET [--location LOCATION] [--storage-class CLASS]
gcgo storage rb gs://BUCKET
gcgo storage sign-url gs://BUCKET/OBJECT
```

### container — GKE

```
gcgo container clusters list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo container clusters describe CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
gcgo container clusters create CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
gcgo container clusters delete CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
gcgo container clusters update CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
gcgo container clusters upgrade CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
gcgo container clusters get-credentials CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
gcgo container clusters operations list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo container node-pools list --cluster CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
gcgo container node-pools describe NODE_POOL --cluster CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
```

### run — Cloud Run

```
gcgo run services list [--region REGION]
gcgo run services describe SERVICE [--region REGION]
gcgo run services delete SERVICE [--region REGION]
gcgo run services update SERVICE [--region REGION]
gcgo run services update-traffic SERVICE [--region REGION]
gcgo run services rollback SERVICE [--region REGION]
gcgo run revisions list [--region REGION]
gcgo run revisions describe REVISION [--region REGION]
gcgo run jobs list [--region REGION]
gcgo run jobs describe JOB [--region REGION]
gcgo run deploy [--region REGION]
```

### functions — Cloud Functions

```
gcgo functions list [--region REGION]
gcgo functions describe FUNCTION [--region REGION]
gcgo functions deploy FUNCTION [--region REGION] [--runtime RUNTIME] [--entry-point EP] [--source PATH] [--trigger-http | --trigger-topic TOPIC] [--memory SIZE] [--timeout DURATION]
gcgo functions delete FUNCTION [--region REGION]
gcgo functions call FUNCTION [--region REGION] [--data JSON]
```

### iam — Identity and Access Management

```
gcgo iam service-accounts list
gcgo iam service-accounts create ACCOUNT_ID [--display-name NAME]
gcgo iam service-accounts delete EMAIL
gcgo iam service-accounts keys list --iam-account EMAIL
gcgo iam service-accounts keys create --iam-account EMAIL
gcgo iam service-accounts keys delete KEY_ID --iam-account EMAIL
gcgo iam roles list
gcgo iam roles describe ROLE
```

### logging — Cloud Logging

```
gcgo logging read [FILTER] [--limit N]
gcgo logging tail [FILTER]
gcgo logging sinks list
gcgo logging sinks describe SINK
gcgo logging sinks create SINK
gcgo logging sinks delete SINK
```

### pubsub — Cloud Pub/Sub

Topics:
```
gcgo pubsub topics list
gcgo pubsub topics describe TOPIC
gcgo pubsub topics create TOPIC
gcgo pubsub topics delete TOPIC
gcgo pubsub topics publish TOPIC --message MESSAGE [--attribute KEY=VALUE]
```

Subscriptions:
```
gcgo pubsub subscriptions list
gcgo pubsub subscriptions describe SUBSCRIPTION
gcgo pubsub subscriptions create SUBSCRIPTION --topic TOPIC [--ack-deadline SECONDS]
gcgo pubsub subscriptions delete SUBSCRIPTION
gcgo pubsub subscriptions pull SUBSCRIPTION [--max-messages N]
```

Schemas:
```
gcgo pubsub schemas list
gcgo pubsub schemas describe SCHEMA
gcgo pubsub schemas create SCHEMA [--type TYPE] [--definition DEF]
gcgo pubsub schemas delete SCHEMA
```

### sql — Cloud SQL

```
gcgo sql instances list
gcgo sql instances describe INSTANCE
gcgo sql instances create INSTANCE
gcgo sql instances delete INSTANCE
gcgo sql databases list --instance INSTANCE
gcgo sql databases describe DATABASE --instance INSTANCE
gcgo sql databases create DATABASE --instance INSTANCE
gcgo sql databases delete DATABASE --instance INSTANCE
gcgo sql users list --instance INSTANCE
gcgo sql users create USER --instance INSTANCE
gcgo sql users delete USER --instance INSTANCE
gcgo sql backups list --instance INSTANCE
gcgo sql backups describe BACKUP
gcgo sql backups create --instance INSTANCE
gcgo sql backups delete BACKUP
gcgo sql operations list --instance INSTANCE
gcgo sql operations describe OPERATION
```

### spanner — Cloud Spanner

```
gcgo spanner instances list
gcgo spanner instances describe INSTANCE
gcgo spanner instances create INSTANCE
gcgo spanner instances delete INSTANCE
gcgo spanner databases list --instance INSTANCE
gcgo spanner databases describe DATABASE --instance INSTANCE
gcgo spanner databases create DATABASE --instance INSTANCE
gcgo spanner databases delete DATABASE --instance INSTANCE
gcgo spanner backups list --instance INSTANCE
gcgo spanner backups describe BACKUP --instance INSTANCE
```

### firestore — Firestore

```
gcgo firestore list
gcgo firestore describe DATABASE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo firestore create DATABASE [--location LOCATION] [--type TYPE]
gcgo firestore delete DATABASE [--etag ETAG]
gcgo firestore export DATABASE --output-uri gs://BUCKET/PREFIX [--collection COL] [--namespace NS]
gcgo firestore import DATABASE --input-uri gs://BUCKET/PREFIX [--collection COL] [--namespace NS]
gcgo firestore operations list [--filter FILTER]
gcgo firestore operations describe OPERATION_NAME
gcgo firestore indexes list [--database DATABASE] [--collection-group GROUP]
gcgo firestore indexes describe INDEX_NAME
gcgo firestore indexes create [--database DATABASE] [--collection-group GROUP] [--index-json JSON]
gcgo firestore indexes delete INDEX_NAME
```

### bigtable — Cloud Bigtable

```
gcgo bigtable instances list
gcgo bigtable instances describe INSTANCE
gcgo bigtable instances create INSTANCE [--display-name NAME] [--cluster CLUSTER] [--zone ZONE] [--serve-nodes N] [--type TYPE] [--storage-type TYPE]
gcgo bigtable instances delete INSTANCE
gcgo bigtable tables list --instance INSTANCE
gcgo bigtable tables describe TABLE --instance INSTANCE
gcgo bigtable tables create TABLE --instance INSTANCE
gcgo bigtable tables delete TABLE --instance INSTANCE
gcgo bigtable instances backups list --instance INSTANCE [--cluster CLUSTER]
gcgo bigtable instances backups describe BACKUP
gcgo bigtable instances backups create BACKUP --instance INSTANCE --cluster CLUSTER --source-table TABLE [--expire-time TIME]
gcgo bigtable instances backups delete BACKUP
gcgo bigtable operations list [--filter FILTER]
gcgo bigtable operations describe OPERATION_NAME
```

### alloydb — AlloyDB

```
gcgo alloydb clusters list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo alloydb clusters describe CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
gcgo alloydb clusters create CLUSTER [--location LOCATION] [--display-name NAME] [--network NET] [--username USER] [--password PASS]
gcgo alloydb clusters delete CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
gcgo alloydb instances list --cluster CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
gcgo alloydb instances describe INSTANCE --cluster CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
gcgo alloydb instances create INSTANCE --cluster CLUSTER [--location LOCATION] [--instance-type TYPE] [--cpu-count N]
gcgo alloydb instances delete INSTANCE --cluster CLUSTER [--location LOCATION]
```

### redis — Memorystore for Redis

```
gcgo redis instances list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo redis instances describe INSTANCE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo redis instances create INSTANCE [--location LOCATION] [--tier TIER] [--memory-size-gb N] [--authorized-network NET]
gcgo redis instances delete INSTANCE [--location LOCATION]
```

### secrets — Secret Manager

```
gcgo secrets list
gcgo secrets describe SECRET
gcgo secrets create SECRET [--replication-policy POLICY] [--data DATA]
gcgo secrets delete SECRET
gcgo secrets versions list SECRET
gcgo secrets versions access SECRET VERSION
```

### kms — Cloud KMS

```
gcgo kms key-rings list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo kms key-rings describe KEY_RING [--location LOCATION]
gcgo kms key-rings create KEY_RING [--location LOCATION]
gcgo kms crypto-keys list KEY_RING [--location LOCATION]
gcgo kms crypto-keys describe CRYPTO_KEY [--location LOCATION]
gcgo kms crypto-keys create CRYPTO_KEY [--location LOCATION] [--purpose PURPOSE] [--rotation-period PERIOD]
gcgo kms crypto-key-versions list KEY_RING CRYPTO_KEY [--location LOCATION]
```

### monitoring — Cloud Monitoring

```
gcgo monitoring dashboards list
gcgo monitoring dashboards describe NAME
gcgo monitoring dashboards create [--display-name NAME]
gcgo monitoring dashboards delete NAME
gcgo monitoring policies list
gcgo monitoring policies describe NAME
gcgo monitoring policies create [--display-name NAME]
gcgo monitoring policies delete NAME
gcgo monitoring channels list
gcgo monitoring channels describe NAME
gcgo monitoring channels create [--display-name NAME] [--type TYPE]
gcgo monitoring channels delete NAME
```

### scheduler — Cloud Scheduler

```
gcgo scheduler jobs list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo scheduler jobs describe JOB [--location LOCATION]
gcgo scheduler jobs create JOB --schedule CRON --uri URI [--location LOCATION]
gcgo scheduler jobs delete JOB [--location LOCATION]
gcgo scheduler jobs pause JOB [--location LOCATION]
gcgo scheduler jobs resume JOB [--location LOCATION]
```

### tasks — Cloud Tasks

```
gcgo tasks queues list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo tasks queues describe QUEUE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo tasks queues create QUEUE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo tasks queues delete QUEUE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo tasks tasks list QUEUE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo tasks tasks create QUEUE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo tasks tasks delete QUEUE TASK [--location LOCATION]
```

### builds — Cloud Build

```
gcgo builds list
gcgo builds describe BUILD_ID
gcgo builds cancel BUILD_ID
gcgo builds triggers list
gcgo builds triggers describe TRIGGER_ID
gcgo builds triggers create [--name NAME] [--repo-name REPO] [--branch-name BRANCH] [--filename FILE]
gcgo builds triggers delete TRIGGER_ID
gcgo builds triggers run TRIGGER_ID
```

### artifacts — Artifact Registry

```
gcgo artifacts repositories list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo artifacts repositories describe REPOSITORY [--location LOCATION]
gcgo artifacts repositories create REPOSITORY [--location LOCATION] [--format FORMAT] [--description DESC]
gcgo artifacts repositories delete REPOSITORY [--location LOCATION]
gcgo artifacts packages list [--location LOCATION] [--repository REPO]
gcgo artifacts packages delete PACKAGE [--location LOCATION] [--repository REPO]
gcgo artifacts versions list [--location LOCATION] [--repository REPO] [--package PKG]
gcgo artifacts versions delete VERSION [--location LOCATION] [--repository REPO] [--package PKG]
```

### deploy — Cloud Deploy

```
gcgo deploy delivery-pipelines list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo deploy delivery-pipelines describe PIPELINE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo deploy delivery-pipelines create PIPELINE [--location LOCATION] [--target TARGET]
gcgo deploy delivery-pipelines delete PIPELINE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo deploy releases list PIPELINE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo deploy releases describe PIPELINE RELEASE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo deploy releases create PIPELINE RELEASE [--location LOCATION] [--skaffold-config-uri URI]
```

### dataflow — Dataflow

```
gcgo dataflow jobs list [--filter FILTER]
gcgo dataflow jobs describe JOB
gcgo dataflow jobs messages JOB [--minimum-importance LEVEL] [--start-time TIME] [--end-time TIME]
gcgo dataflow jobs metrics JOB [--start-time TIME]
gcgo dataflow jobs cancel JOB
gcgo dataflow jobs drain JOB
gcgo dataflow snapshots list [--job JOB]
gcgo dataflow snapshots describe SNAPSHOT
gcgo dataflow snapshots create JOB [--ttl DURATION]
gcgo dataflow snapshots delete SNAPSHOT
gcgo dataflow flex-templates launch [--job-name NAME] [--container-spec-gcs-path PATH] [--param KEY=VALUE]
gcgo dataflow templates get [--gcs-path PATH]
gcgo dataflow templates launch [--gcs-path PATH] [--job-name NAME] [--parameter KEY=VALUE]
```

### dataproc — Dataproc

```
gcgo dataproc clusters list [--region REGION]
gcgo dataproc clusters describe CLUSTER [--region REGION]
gcgo dataproc clusters create CLUSTER [--region REGION] [--machine-type TYPE] [--num-workers N] [--image-version VERSION]
gcgo dataproc clusters delete CLUSTER [--region REGION]
gcgo dataproc clusters start CLUSTER [--region REGION]
gcgo dataproc clusters stop CLUSTER [--region REGION]
gcgo dataproc jobs list [--region REGION]
gcgo dataproc jobs describe JOB_ID [--region REGION]
gcgo dataproc jobs submit [--region REGION] [--cluster CLUSTER] [--class CLASS] [--jars JARS]
gcgo dataproc jobs cancel JOB_ID [--region REGION]
gcgo dataproc batches list [--region REGION]
gcgo dataproc batches describe BATCH [--region REGION]
gcgo dataproc batches create [--region REGION] [--batch-id ID] [--class CLASS]
gcgo dataproc batches delete BATCH [--region REGION]
```

### dataplex — Dataplex

```
gcgo dataplex lakes list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo dataplex lakes describe LAKE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo dataplex lakes create LAKE [--location LOCATION] [--display-name NAME]
gcgo dataplex lakes delete LAKE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo dataplex zones list --lake LAKE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo dataplex zones describe ZONE --lake LAKE [--location LOCATION]
gcgo dataplex zones create ZONE --lake LAKE [--location LOCATION] [--type TYPE]
gcgo dataplex zones delete ZONE --lake LAKE [--location LOCATION]
```

### datacatalog — Data Catalog

```
gcgo datacatalog entry-groups list
gcgo datacatalog entry-groups describe ENTRY_GROUP
gcgo datacatalog entry-groups create ENTRY_GROUP [--display-name NAME] [--description DESC]
gcgo datacatalog entry-groups delete ENTRY_GROUP
gcgo datacatalog entries list --entry-group ENTRY_GROUP
gcgo datacatalog entries describe ENTRY --entry-group ENTRY_GROUP
```

### composer — Cloud Composer

```
gcgo composer environments list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo composer environments describe ENVIRONMENT [--location LOCATION]
gcgo composer environments create ENVIRONMENT [--location LOCATION] [--node-count N] [--machine-type TYPE] [--image-version VERSION]
gcgo composer environments delete ENVIRONMENT [--location LOCATION]
gcgo composer environments update ENVIRONMENT [--location LOCATION] [--node-count N] [--label KEY=VALUE]
```

### workflows — Workflows

```
gcgo workflows list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo workflows describe WORKFLOW [--location LOCATION]
gcgo workflows deploy WORKFLOW --source-file FILE [--location LOCATION] [--service-account SA]
gcgo workflows delete WORKFLOW [--location LOCATION]
```

### eventarc — Eventarc

```
gcgo eventarc triggers list [--location LOCATION]
gcgo eventarc triggers describe TRIGGER [--location LOCATION]
gcgo eventarc triggers create TRIGGER [--location LOCATION] [--event-type TYPE] [--filter KEY=VALUE] [--workflow WORKFLOW | --cloud-run-service SERVICE]
gcgo eventarc triggers delete TRIGGER [--location LOCATION]
```

### scc — Security Command Center

```
gcgo scc findings list SOURCE [--filter FILTER]
gcgo scc findings set-state FINDING --state ACTIVE|INACTIVE
gcgo scc findings set-mute FINDING --mute MUTED|UNMUTED
gcgo scc sources ORG_ID
gcgo scc notifications list ORG_ID
gcgo scc notifications describe NAME
gcgo scc notifications create ORG_ID CONFIG_ID --topic TOPIC [--filter FILTER]
gcgo scc notifications delete NAME
```

### asset — Cloud Asset Inventory

```
gcgo asset search-all-resources [--scope SCOPE] [--query QUERY] [--asset-types TYPES]
gcgo asset search-all-iam-policies [--scope SCOPE] [--query QUERY]
gcgo asset export [--scope SCOPE] [--output-path gs://BUCKET/PREFIX] [--asset-types TYPES] [--content-type TYPE]
gcgo asset analyze-iam-policy [--scope SCOPE] [--identity IDENTITY] [--permission PERM] [--resource-name RES]
gcgo asset feeds list [--scope SCOPE]
gcgo asset feeds describe FEED_NAME
gcgo asset feeds create FEED_ID [--scope SCOPE] [--topic TOPIC] [--asset-types TYPES]
gcgo asset feeds delete FEED_NAME
```

### billing — Cloud Billing

```
gcgo billing accounts list
gcgo billing accounts describe ACCOUNT_ID
gcgo billing projects list ACCOUNT_ID
gcgo billing projects describe PROJECT_ID
gcgo billing projects link PROJECT_ID --billing-account ACCOUNT_ID
gcgo billing projects unlink PROJECT_ID
gcgo billing budgets list BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID
gcgo billing budgets describe BUDGET_NAME
gcgo billing budgets create BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID [--display-name NAME] [--amount AMOUNT] [--currency-code CODE]
gcgo billing budgets delete BUDGET_NAME
```

### ai — Vertex AI

```
gcgo ai models list
gcgo ai models describe MODEL
gcgo ai endpoints list
gcgo ai endpoints describe ENDPOINT
gcgo ai custom-jobs list
gcgo ai custom-jobs describe JOB
gcgo ai datasets list
gcgo ai datasets describe DATASET
gcgo ai pipeline-jobs list
gcgo ai pipeline-jobs describe JOB
gcgo ai batch-prediction-jobs list
gcgo ai batch-prediction-jobs describe JOB
gcgo ai operations list [--filter FILTER]
gcgo ai operations describe OPERATION_NAME
```

### organizations — Resource Manager

```
gcgo organizations list
gcgo organizations describe ORG_ID
gcgo organizations get-iam-policy ORG_ID
```

### folders — Resource Manager

```
gcgo folders list [--parent PARENT]
gcgo folders describe FOLDER_ID
gcgo folders create [--parent PARENT] [--display-name NAME]
gcgo folders delete FOLDER_ID
gcgo folders move FOLDER_ID --destination-parent PARENT
```

### services — Service Usage

```
gcgo services list
gcgo services describe SERVICE
gcgo services enable SERVICE
gcgo services disable SERVICE
```

## Output

All list and describe commands support `--format json` for machine-readable output. Default is a human-readable table to stdout. Errors go to stderr.

## Differences from gcloud

- No `alpha`/`beta`/`ga` command groups — commands are flat per service.
- No `gcloud init` — configure with `gcgo config set`.
- No components — single static binary, always up to date.
- Auth is ADC-only — no device flow stored in gcloud's credential store (use `gcgo auth login` which writes ADC credentials).
- Startup time is under 20ms vs ~500ms for gcloud.
